title: Magnetic Separator Pick Up Tool l Industrial Quality 16 lbs Quick Release Handle
description:
This Magnetic Separator Tool is perfect for helping pick-up those loose pieces of metal such as nails, screws, pins, staples and more! The quick release handle makes it simple and safe to remove the pieces from the magnetic surface. Just squeeze and everything effortlessly falls into the trash or storage bin. Holds up to 16 lbs of magnetic material.

Magnetic Separator Pick Up Tool l Industrial Quality 16 lbs Quick Release Handle

This Magnetic Separator Tool is perfect for helping pick-up those loose pieces of metal such as nails, screws, pins, staples and more!

Key Features

  • MAGNETIC SEPARATOR PICKUP TOOL: A great tool to have for separating metal objects from non-metal objects; the built-in handle makes the handheld magnet pickup tool easy to use and on works when you squeeze the handle
  • FAST EFFICIENT AND COMPACT: At just under five inches tall, this powerful and compact handheld magnet tool can grab up to 8lbs of metal material; works quickly and efficiently to separate found metal from other material or debris
  • EASY TO USE QUICK RELEASE HANDLE: Easy to use, simply pull the handle upwards for quick release of your gold or other metal finds; the magnetic pickup tool handle is rubberized making it comfortable to hold and easy to grip when releasing
  • MULTIPURPOSE TOOL: Used in other home or commercial settings like a workshop, garage, construction site, house renovation and more for picking up or separating metal materials
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Magnetic Surface Diameter Dimensions: 3 inches; Handle Material Rubber; Body Material: Metal; Weight: 0.55lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MSPUT
  • UPC: 764324089089
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 16 lb
